# nxos_netflow (Data Source)

This data source can read the Netflow configuration on NX-OS devices, including exporters, records, monitors, hardware profiles, and class maps.

### API Documentation

- [flowEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Flow/flow:Entity/)
- [flowExporter](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Flow/flow:Exporter/)
- [flowRecord](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Flow/flow:Record/)
- [flowMonitor](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Flow/flow:Monitor/)
- [flowExporterBucket](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Flow/flow:ExporterBucket/)
- [flowHwProfile](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Flow/flow:HwProfile/)
- [flowClassMap](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Flow/flow:ClassMap/)
- [flowMatchAcl](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/Flow/flow:MatchAcl/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nxos_netflow" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

### Read-Only

- `class_maps` (Attributes Map) Netflow class map configuration.
  - Map key: `name` - Name of class-map. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--class_maps))
- `exporters` (Attributes Map) Netflow exporter (collector) configuration.
  - Map key: `name` - Flow exporter name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--exporters))
- `hardware_profiles` (Attributes Map) Netflow hardware profile configuration.
  - Map key: `name` - Hardware profile name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--hardware_profiles))
- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.
- `monitors` (Attributes Map) Netflow monitor configuration.
  - Map key: `name` - Flow monitor name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--monitors))
- `records` (Attributes Map) Netflow record configuration.
  - Map key: `name` - Flow record name. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--records))

<a id="nestedatt--class_maps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `class_maps`

Read-Only:

- `match_acls` (Attributes Map) Match ACL configuration.
  - Map key: `name` - Match using ACL. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--class_maps--match_acls))

<a id="nestedatt--class_maps--match_acls"></a>
### Nested Schema for `class_maps.match_acls`



<a id="nestedatt--exporters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `exporters`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Flow exporter description.
- `destination_ip` (String) Collector IP.
- `destination_port` (Number) Collector L4 Port.
- `dscp` (Number) DSCP value.
- `source_interface` (String) Source Interface.
- `version` (String) Export version format.
- `vrf_name` (String) Collector VRF.


<a id="nestedatt--hardware_profiles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `hardware_profiles`

Read-Only:

- `burst_interval_shift` (Number) Timestamp shift value for burst interval.
- `description` (String) Hardware profile description.
- `export_interval` (Number) Export Interval in milliseconds.
- `ip_packet_id_shift` (Number) IP Packet ID Shift.
- `mtu` (Number) MTU.
- `source_port` (Number) Source L4 Port.


<a id="nestedatt--monitors"></a>
### Nested Schema for `monitors`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Flow monitor description.
- `exporter_buckets` (Attributes Map) Flow exporter bucket configuration.
  - Map key: `id` - Flow exporter bucket ID.
  - Key range: `0`-`255` (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--monitors--exporter_buckets))

<a id="nestedatt--monitors--exporter_buckets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `monitors.exporter_buckets`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Flow exporter bucket description.
- `hash_high` (Number) Hash high.
- `hash_low` (Number) Hash low.



<a id="nestedatt--records"></a>
### Nested Schema for `records`

Read-Only:

- `collect_parameters` (String) Collect Params.
- `description` (String) Flow record description.
- `match_parameters` (String) Match Params.
